channel.title: Add hooks before the framework starts
channel.description:
# Description I need to add hooks before the framework running to modify koa's app object .
# Examples when you use `x-forwarded-host` is real host , you need enable proxy and set `ctx.app.proxy = true` in koa object.

item.title: Add hooks before the framework starts
item.dc:creator: liyikun.l
item.description:
Description

I need to add hooks before the framework running to modify koa’s app object .

Examples

when you use x-forwarded-host is real host , you need enable proxy and set ctx.app.proxy = true in koa object.

Read full topic
item.source: Add hooks before the framework starts
